summary: Iteration 50: Refund Manager Overhaul - All features tested and working. 2-step refund flow (initiate → review), detail view, print/PDF, CSV export, 4 tabs all verified.
seed_data_creation: Created test refunds via API during testing (pending_review, processed, rejected statuses)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 tested Refund Manager overhaul. All features working: (1) 2-step refund flow - initiate creates 'pending_review' status, review approves/rejects, (2) Detail view with Client & Payment, Refund Info, Partner, Processing sections, (3) Print/PDF button opens print dialog, (4) Export CSV downloads bulk report, (5) 4 tabs: Pending Review, Refund History, PA Refunds, Issue New, (6) Category field with 5 options (service_issue, client_request, overcharge, duplicate_payment, other), (7) Rejection requires reason (min 5 chars).

2_step_refund_flow.details: POST /api/refunds creates refund with 'pending_review' status. POST /api/refunds/review with action='approve' processes it (status='processed'), action='reject' rejects it (status='rejected').

refund_detail_view.details: GET /api/refunds/detail/{id} returns full detail with sale, initiator, reviewer, partner info. UI shows 4 sections: Client & Payment, Refund Info, Partner, Processing.

print_pdf.details: Print/PDF button visible in detail view. Opens print dialog with formatted refund confirmation.

csv_export.details: Export CSV button visible in refund manager. Downloads bulk report with all refund data.

4_tabs.details: All 4 tabs present: Pending Review (3), Refund History (8), PA Refunds (0), Issue New (33).

category_field.details: Category dropdown with 5 options: service_issue, client_request, overcharge, duplicate_payment, other. Stored correctly in database.

rejection_reason_required.details: POST /api/refunds/review with action='reject' requires review_notes (min 5 chars). Returns 400 if missing.

initiate_validation.details: POST /api/refunds validates: reason required (min 5 chars), amount must be positive, cannot exceed max refundable.

frontend_tests_summary.4_tabs_visible: PASS - Pending Review, Refund History, PA Refunds, Issue New
frontend_tests_summary.detail_view: PASS - Opens with Back button and Print/PDF button
frontend_tests_summary.initiate_refund_dialog: PASS - Amount, Category, Reason, Method, Notes fields
frontend_tests_summary.pending_review_cards: PASS - 3 pending refunds with Review/Approve/Reject buttons
frontend_tests_summary.review_detail_view: PASS - Approve & Process and Reject Refund buttons visible

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
